summary: Registered the product-owner M7 UI/localization/art coordination directive, created the M7 visual/UX handoff coordination task, and delivered the handoff request to the designated art thread.

tests_run.result: Branch research/m7-beta-culture-review with process/status edits and new message/task files pending commit.
Read product-owner directive and Prompt B source.
Current M7 task list loaded before adding M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001.
M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 was the only READY task before the visual/UX handoff coordination task was registered as IN_PROGRESS.
Submitted M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-ART-COORDINATION-001 update to current historical_researcher writer; submission_id=019f0e1b-a0e5-7301-b21f-6401e13ad61b.
Submitted M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001 request to designated art/visual thread; submission_id=019f0e1c-192f-7632-a787-54bde749b0e8.

decisions.decision: Treat the inbound document as a current product-owner directive for a M7 UI / Localization / Visual Direction quality track; keep repository facts authoritative where the document's progress descriptions are stale.
Start a coordination-only task for structured visual/UX handoff before later UI beautification implementation; no product code or UI implementation is authorized by this task.

risks.summary: The art thread accepted send_input, but its final handoff is still pending and must be reviewed before it can drive implementation tasks.
UI/localization/visual work can drift into new systems or manual node battle unless future tasks preserve M7 content-lock boundaries and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE.

requested_action: Wait for the art/visual handoff, continue M7-BETA-CULTURE-REVIEW-001, then route the returned handoff to systems_architect and qa_reviewer before implementing UI/localization tasks.
